TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Michel_Aoun, title = Michel_Aoun, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Michel_Aoun} }

S.FORM: Michel Aoun ryax sa tay 30 nqu tay 9, Michel Aoun, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1933) mrhuw Lebanon ta' misuw hya' ga Michel Aoun, aring ryax tay 31 squ byacing tay 10 sa kawas 2016 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'

Michel Aoun ryax sa tay 30 nqu tay 9, Michel Aoun, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1933) mrhuw Lebanon ta' misuw hya' ga Michel Aoun, aring ryax tay 31 squ byacing tay 10 sa kawas 2016 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: miʦ~ʨħel aoun rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, miʦ~ʨħel aoun, s~ɕquliq na s~ɕeziʔ. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw leβanon taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa miʦ~ʨħel aoun, ariŋ rjax taj ** s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj ** s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ
